headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a 12-4 victory, while the Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 win over the Cleveland Guardians. The Atlanta Braves shut out the Philadelphia Phillies 9-0, and the San Francisco Giants took down the Washington Nationals 10-5.

Injuries and availability are impacting several teams. The New York Mets placed second baseman Jorge Polanco on the 10-day injured list due to a right wrist contusion. The Seattle Mariners, Detroit Tigers, Houston Astros, Chicago Cubs, Washington Nationals, Texas Rangers have also made injury-related roster moves.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handed pitcher Axel Perez in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. The New York Mets traded left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Milwaukee Brewers acquired right-handed pitcher Junior Fernández from the Arizona Diamondbacks, while the Philadelphia Phillies traded right-handed pitcher Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers. The Baltimore Orioles also acquired first baseman Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds for cash.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Mets 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a lopsided 12-4 victory, securing their win. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians 6-4**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians in their recent matchup. Daniel Schneemann led the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Braves Shut Out Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Logan Webb earning the win. Heliot Ramos led the Giants' offense with a home run and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mets Place Jorge Polanco on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: New York Mets second baseman Jorge Polanco has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right wrist contusion. The move is retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Axel Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired right-handed pitcher Axel Perez in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Perez joins the Orioles in exchange for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott.
